options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -align
options.description: Specifies whether to support align objects.

options.name: -allow_45_degree
options.description: Specifies whether to allow creation of a 45-degree wire.

options.name: -arrow_increment
options.description: Specifies the step increments in microns to move wires with the arrow keys.

options.name: -assign_multi_pattern_color
options.description: Specifies how to assign the mask color on the DPT layer of the wire segment to be created.

options.name: -auto_assign_net
options.description: Auto assign the net from touched objects to edit wires/vias. Only enable this behavior for specified edit function.

options.name: -auto_distribute_bus
options.description: Auto distribute a group of wires, and set same spacing based on option -bus_total_width_vertical or -bus_total_width_horizontal.

options.name: -auto_split_bus
options.description: Splits buses automatically to avoid DRC violations.

options.name: -bus_honor_start_params
options.description: Specifies that the wire width and spacing of the start points (pins) should be honored when drawing routes for a bus.

options.name: -bus_honor_width_setting
options.description: Specifies whether the tool should adjust the wire width when snapping bus wires to pin.

options.name: -bus_total_width_horizontal
options.description: This option can specify the total width of horizontal bus. So when tool drawing a bus, tool auto set spacing as:wire spacing = (<total bus width> - <total wire width>)/ (<wire number> - 1).

options.name: -bus_total_width_vertical
options.description: This option can specify the total width of vertical bus. So when tool drawing a bus, tool auto set spacing as:wire spacing = (<total bus width> - <total wire width>)/ (<wire number> - 1).

options.name: -change_order_at_turn
options.description: Specifies whether the order of the wires changes or stays the same when the wire makes a 90-degree turn. (Reverse Order | Keep Order)

options.name: -check_design_boundary
options.description: Specifies whether stop user to stretch the wire in the forbidden area which defined by -pull_back_distance.

options.name: -circle_NDR_vias_only
options.description: Specifies that when the Shift + N/P bindkey is used, the tool should circle through NDR vias only.

options.name: -close_polygons
options.description: Specifies whether to close a special route structure toward itself.

options.name: -color_align_with_track
options.description: Specifies whether the wire color is to be changed to match the track color during a move or copy operation.

options.name: -connect_pin
options.description: Specifies whether or not generate a via on the pin for specified pin type.

options.name: -connect_with_specified_layer
options.description: Specifies whether or not the layer of connecting wires should be changed as per the -layer_horizontal or -layer_vertical setting when moving wires.

options.name: -create_crossover_vias
options.description: Specifies whether the software creates a via when you draw a wire that crosses a wire or pin of the same net that is on a different layer.

options.name: -create_is_edit_flag
options.description: Specifies whether to create isEdit flag for wire edit

options.name: -create_via_on_pin
options.description: Specifies whether the software creates vias at pins.

options.name: -cut_class
options.description: Specifies the cut class name of the generated via when editing wires.

options.name: -cut_wire_overlap
options.description: Specifies whether or not overlaps are created while cutting specified type of wires.

options.name: -debug_file
options.description: Specifies the report file name.

options.name: -delete_pin_with_wire
options.description: Delete Pin with Wire

options.name: -delete_tsv
options.description: Specifies whether to delete the items on TSV layer or not.

options.name: -delete_wire_via_deep_through
options.description: Delete Wire Via in deep through mode

options.name: -display_wire_length_with_cursor
options.description: Specifies whether display the total/current wire length with mouse when editing wires.

options.name: -draw_shield
options.description: Specifies whether draw a shield net only.

options.name: -draw_with_group_centerline
options.description: Turn on this option, tool should draw bus along the center-line of whole wires.

options.name: -drawing_wire
options.description: Specifies which of the nets used with the -nets parameter corresponding to the mouse pointer location when adding an array of wires.

options.name: -drc_aware_cross_metal
options.description: Specifies whether to stretch or move wires back to the closest location available before a violation occurs with the crossing metal. This option only work if "setEditMode -stop_at_drc" set to 1.

options.name: -drc_on
options.description: Specifies whether to check DRC rules during wire editing.

options.name: -drc_use_non_default_spacing
options.description: Specifies whether non-default spacing defined in the Non-Default Rule of the editing net should be used for spacing check during wire editing.

options.name: -extend_wires
options.description: Specifies whether, after completing a signal or power route, the specified boundary of wire segment extends and connects to the first logical target

options.name: -final_check_with_verify
options.description: Specifies whether to do final check with verify

options.name: -ignore_drc
options.description: Specifies which violation type should be ignored during wire editing.

options.name: -jog_connect_layer
options.description: Specifies the number of layers for connecting wires above the layers for moving wires. If set the parameter of 'setEditMode -connect_with_specified_layer' to 1, disable this option.

options.name: -keep_floating_via
options.description: Keep floating vias when user deleting wires.

options.name: -keep_status
options.description: Specifies whether to keep object status during editing.

options.name: -keep_via
options.description: Specifies whether keep original via in wire move or change width.

options.name: -lateral_movement_range
options.description: Specified the max lateral movement distance to avoid DRC when add a wire.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the layer for patch wires or polygon wires.

options.name: -layer_horizontal
options.description: Specifies the layer for horizontal wires.

options.name: -layer_maximum
options.description: Specifies the maximum layer for routing.

options.name: -layer_minimum
options.description: Specifies the minimum layer for routing.

options.name: -layer_vertical
options.description: Specifies the layer for vertical wires.

options.name: -look_down_layers
options.description: Specifies the number of layers below the current layer that added wires will connect to with a via.

options.name: -look_up_layers
options.description: Specifies the number of layers above the current layer that added wires will connect to with a via.

options.name: -max_pointer_number
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of pointers to be returned by wire edit commands.

options.name: -mirror_bus_route
options.description: Specifies that whether to reverse the net order for bus route.

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specifies one or more nets for editing.

options.name: -no_merge_special_wire
options.description: Specifies whether automatically merge the added special wires with any existing special wires.

options.name: -only_show_edit_layer
options.description: Turn on this option, when user editing any wires/vias, only show the layer from edit objects, and dim other objects.

options.name: -orthogonal_connection_only
options.description: Specifies whether to consider wires and pins that are in the same direction as a target for connection. Only special wire is supported.

options.name: -outer_shield_spacing
options.description: Specifies a spacing value in microns to be used by the -shield low and -shield high parameters.

options.name: -outer_shield_width
options.description: Specifies a width value in microns to be used for outer shield(s) depending on the values of -shield low or -shield high parameters.

options.name: -override
options.description: Specifies whether to use the override specification.

options.name: -partial_overlap_threshold
options.description: Specifies ratio threshold of special via creation on partial overlap wires.

options.name: -pull_back_distance
options.description: Specify the value for forbidden distance. Default is Auto, it means use the largest min spacing of the layer.

options.name: -reshape
options.description: Specifies that when you add new wires, existing redundant wires within the route are automatically removed.

options.name: -return_object_pointer
options.description: Specifies whether return pointers after wire edit operations.

options.name: -rule
options.description: Uses the specified LEF rule for regular wires.

options.name: -shape
options.description: Specifies the shape associated with the wire you draw.

options.name: -shield
options.description: Specifies whether to add a minimum width shield wire for specified side.

options.name: -shield_look_down_layers
options.description: Specifies the number of layers below the current layer that an added shield wire can connect using a via.

options.name: -shield_look_up_layers
options.description: Specifies the number of layers above the current layer that an added shield wire can connect using a via.

options.name: -shield_shape
options.description: Specifies the shape associated with the shield wire you draw.

options.name: -shielding_nets
options.description: Specifies net names for shield wires, usually power or ground names.

options.name: -show_drc_info_for_edit_shape
options.description: Turn on this option, when user editing any wires/vias and generate a violation, tool can display the detail information nearby marker.

options.name: -sibling_look_down_layers
options.description: Specifies the number of layers below the sibling layers that an added shield wire can connect using a via.

options.name: -sibling_look_up_layers
options.description: Specifies the number of layers above the sibling layers that an added shield wire can connect using a via.

options.name: -snap
options.description: Specifies whether to enable wire and via snap.

options.name: -snap_align_to
options.description: Specifies how to align with a pin when ending a route.

options.name: -snap_bus_to_pin
options.description: Specifies whether to change wire width, spacing and order according to the connected pin.

options.name: -snap_end_to
options.description: Specifies whether to snap the end of wire to specified objects.

options.name: -snap_objects_to_track
options.description: Specifies whether to snap added or moved specified wires to the closest routing track in the preferred direction for the layer automatically.

options.name: -snap_to
options.description: Specifies whether to snap added or moved wires to specified objects.

options.name: -snap_to_track_honor_color
options.description: Specifies whether to snap wires to a track with the same color automatically.

options.name: -snap_trim_metal_to_trim_grid
options.description: Specify whether snap the trim metal to the closest trim grid during trim metal editing.

options.name: -spacing
options.description: Specifies the distance between wires.

options.name: -spacing_horizontal
options.description: Specifies the distance between horizontal wires.

options.name: -spacing_vertical
options.description: Specifies the distance between vertical wires.

options.name: -status
options.description: Specifies the status associated with the wire you draw.

options.name: -stop_at_drc
options.description: Specifies whether the software can cause a DRC violation by moving or stretching a wire.

options.name: -stretch_end
options.description: Specifies the direction in which to stretch or reduce wires.

options.name: -stretch_with_intersect
options.description: Enables wires with intersects to be stretched easily.

options.name: -subclass
options.description: Specifies the subclass name of wires and vias.

options.name: -turn_at
options.description: Specifies the start location of new wire when do turn.

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies the type of creating wire.

options.name: -unrestricted_regular_wire_width
options.description: Specifies whether the regular wire width is unrestricted in edit.

options.name: -update_shield_net
options.description: Specifies whether automatically update shield net attribute on the signal net.

options.name: -use_fixVia
options.description: Specifies whether to use fixVia for special via with minStep DRC violation.

options.name: -use_interleaving_wire_group
options.description: Alternates the specified wires in the wire group.

options.name: -use_wire_group
options.description: Groups multiple wires from the same net.

options.name: -use_wire_group_bits
options.description: Specifies the number of times to replicate a wire in the wire group.

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement
options.description: Creates slots in the wire group by creating wires that connect the wires in the wire group, but are orthogonal to them.

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement_group_via
options.description: Specifies that the wire group uses group vias.

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement_spacing
options.description: Specifies the spacing for the orthogonal wires in the wire groups.

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement_width
options.description: Specifies the width of the orthogonal wires in the wire groups.

options.name: -via_allow_geom_drc
options.description: Check Geometry DRC

options.name: -via_auto_replace
options.description: Controls whether to replace existing vias.

options.name: -via_auto_snap
options.description: Controls whether to snap vias to the intersection of wires on the same net or to the manufacturing grid.

options.name: -via_cell_name
options.description: Specifies the name of the via cell from the LEF or DEF file.

options.name: -via_columns
options.description: Specify the rows of via cut.

options.name: -via_create_by
options.description: Controls whether to create vias based on the -via_cell_name parameter or to create vias based on the other parameters.

options.name: -via_cut_layer
options.description: Specifies the via layer name for the via to created or modify.

options.name: -via_exclude_spec
options.description: Specifies the vias to be ignored by wire editor.

options.name: -via_override_spec
options.description: Specifies the default vias to be used by wire editor.

options.name: -via_rows
options.description: Specify the columns of via cut.

options.name: -via_scale_height
options.description: Specify the via height scale.

options.name: -via_scale_width
options.description: Specify the via width scale.

options.name: -via_snap_honor_color
options.description: Specifies whether to snap the same mask automatically

options.name: -via_snap_to_intersection
options.description: Specifies whether to snap vias to the intersection of wires

options.name: -via_type
options.description: Specifies the type of creating via.

options.name: -width
options.description: Specifies the width of patch wires.

options.name: -width_horizontal
options.description: Specifies the width for horizontal wires.

options.name: -width_vertical
options.description: Specifies the width of vertical wires.

options.name: -wire_override_spec
options.description: Contains the details of the override specification.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
